event: Diary of a Victorian Dandy - 17.00 Hours
description: A staged photographic scene set in a Victorian-era billiards room. Several men in period costume gather around a green billiard table under pendant lamps. A dark-skinned man in a red coat stands at the center, surrounded by white men in Victorian dress. The room is decorated with framed pictures on dark green walls. The lighting creates a warm, intimate atmosphere. The scene appears deliberately composed, resembling a Hogarthian moral narrative recast with a Black protagonist.

_meta.title: DIARY OF A VICTORIAN DANDY. 17.00 HOURS
